# PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.completed

**Case**

the extension has completed all processing required and is up to date with the photos library

## Declaration

```swift
case completed
```

## Processing results

- **PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.failure**: the extension failed the processing task with an error
- **PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.processing**: the extension has only partially completed its processing and still requires more time

items.description: the extension failed the processing task with an error
